features.name: multiple assign drivers on same net
features.description: Code should include two or more continuous assign statements driving the same net, creating conflicting drivers that stress optimizer passes

features.name: inout port with conditional initial assignment
features.description: Code should include an inout port declared with a conditional expression as its initial value, referencing a forward-declared or undeclared signal

features.name: reduction xor on implicitly declared wire
features.description: Code should include a unary reduction XOR operator applied to an implicitly declared (undeclared) wire identifier

features.name: integer declaration with defparam-like suffix
features.description: Code should include an integer variable declaration followed by a hash suffix (#0), which exercises edge cases in the parser and downstream passes

features.name: bitwise xor with literal and implicit wire
features.description: Code should include a bitwise XOR between a numeric literal and an implicitly declared wire, combined with other drivers on the same target net
